system.description:
Discipline: Qinggong
Skill: Athletics TN 6
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You can leap great distance, more than a normal human. Make an Athletics roll against TN 6. On a success you can jump an additional 20 feet per Rank of Qinggong (use the jumping rules from the ATHLETICS entry in CHAPTER ONE of the Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate rulebook). Target Number is set by base distance (ignoring the additional 20 feet per Rank as a factor). On a Total Success you jump an extra 40 feet per Rank of Qinggong. Cathartic: In addition to using the Technique to make a leap or jump, you can also make an Attack or use another Kung Fu ability while in flight. The Ferocious Flower uses Horizontal Sidestep to evade an attack.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: In addition to using the Technique to make a leap or jump, you can also make an Attack or use another Kung Fu ability while in flight. The Ferocious Flower uses Horizontal Sidestep to evade an attack.
